title: . Smart Investor has asked you to create a program that will be used to inform

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
. Smart Investor has asked you to create a program that will be used to inform 
their clients as to whether a possible investment is of high or low risk to 
encourage smarter financial decisions. A high risk investment is any 
investment amount greater than 10% of their account balance. 
The program will need to: 
 Allow the user to enter their account balance and investment amount 
 Check whether the investment is less than and equal to/greater than 
10% of their account balance 
o If the investment is less than and equal to 10% 
 Alert the user that the investment is safe 
o If the investment is greater than 10% 
 Alert the user that the investment is risky

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
and suggest they reconsider 

Here is some sample code in Python that can accomplish this:

# Prompt the user to enter their account balance and investment amount
account_balance = float(input("Enter your current account balance: "))
investment_amount = float(input("Enter the investment amount: "))

# Check if the investment amount is greater than 10% of the account balance
if investment_amount <= account_balance * 0.1:
    print("This investment is safe.")
else:
    print("Warning: This investment is risky and may not be suitable for your financial goals. Please consider your options carefully.") 

# Note: the multiplication of account_balance by 0.1 is equivalent to calculating 10% of the account balance.

turns.speaker: user
